title: Japan Company Filings (EDINET Official)
description: Fetch structured filings of Japanese listed companies from the official EDINET API. Pick a date range and run — defaults return meaningful results in under a minute. The first 3 documents of every run are free.

date_from.title: From date
date_from.description: Start of the submission-date range (YYYY-MM-DD). EDINET lists filings per submission day.

date_to.title: To date
date_to.description: End of the submission-date range (YYYY-MM-DD), inclusive. Up to 31 days are scanned per run.

doc_types.title: Document types
doc_types.description: EDINET document type codes to include. 120 = Annual Securities Report, 160 = Semi-Annual Report.

include_amendments.title: Include amendments
include_amendments.description: Also include amended annual reports (document type 130).

edinet_codes.title: EDINET codes (optional)
edinet_codes.description: Only keep filings by these EDINET filer codes (e.g. E02144).

sec_codes.title: Securities codes (optional)
sec_codes.description: Only keep filings by these securities codes (e.g. 72030 for 7203 Toyota).

enrich.title: LLM-enriched English summaries
enrich.description: Add short English summaries (business overview, key risks, segments) per filing. Charged as a separate per-record event — see Pricing in the README.
